message:
refactor(ui): remove token count chip from conversation metadata header

The approximate token count chip in conversation detail headers added
visual clutter without providing actionable insight during search triage.
The token metric was often approximate and could mislead users about
conversation complexity when the real signal is message role distribution
(already shown via the u/a/t/s chip).

- Remove the `approx_tokens` chip rendering block from metadata header
- Update regression test to assert token metrics are now omitted
- Rename test to `regression_metadata_header_omits_token_metrics` to
  reflect the new expected behavior

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
